info.title: FlashDB REST API
info.description: FlashDB - Database Virtualization Tool REST API. Provides endpoints for managing golden images, clones, checkpoints, search operations, batch operations, and metrics.

tags.name: Batch Operations
tags.description: Execute batch operations on multiple items

tags.name: Metrics
tags.description: View system metrics and performance data

get.description: Check if the API server is running and healthy
Retrieve a list of all available golden images

post.description: Create a new golden image from a backup, replica, or table-by-table copy

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific golden image

delete.description: Delete a golden image by ID

get.description: Retrieve a list of all database clones

post.description: Create a new database clone from a golden image

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific clone

delete.description: Delete a clone and free its storage

get.description: Get all checkpoints created for a specific clone

post.description: Create a new checkpoint (snapshot) of a clone's current state

get.description: Retrieve details of a specific checkpoint

post.description: Restore a clone to a previous checkpoint state

delete.description: Delete a checkpoint and free its storage

get.description: Search recent operations with filters
Search for clones by name, status, or other criteria
Search for checkpoints across all clones

post.description: Execute advanced search with complex filters

get.description: Get all batch operations

post.description: Create a new batch operation for multiple clones or checkpoints

get.description: Get the status of a batch operation

post.description: Cancel a running or pending batch operation

get.description: Get the results of a completed batch operation
Get real-time progress of a running batch operation
Get high-level system metrics
Get metrics for all clones
Get storage usage and allocation metrics
Get metrics about recent operations
Get historical metrics data
Get comprehensive metrics data

path.description: File system path to the VHDX file
